Across 91 career entries in 32 tournaments, Varish has amassed an extraordinary 23 tournament victories — a record that speaks to both dominance and durability.

A true triple-threat, Varish competes across singles, doubles, and mixed doubles — boasting 6 singles titles, 9 doubles titles, 7 mixed doubles titles. The ability to excel in all three disciplines reveals a player with both the individual brilliance to dominate rallies and the court sense to thrive with a partner.

Signature achievements: National Champion in XD U13, BD U13, BD U11 • National Finalist in XD U11, BS U13 • 9 ORC titles (across 6 tournaments) • U.S. Selection Event top-1 finisher.

Varish has demonstrated remarkable doubles adaptability, partnering with 13 different players across the career. Key partnerships:
  • Keira Winarto — 18 events together in U13/XD, producing an outstanding 2 titles
  • Taneesh Musunuru — 12 events together in BD/U13, producing an outstanding 5 titles
  • Prathik Nemani — a trusted BD partner (5 events, best result: #2)

The 2025-2026 season has been outstanding, with 6 podium finishes across 5 tournaments. Varish is playing some of the best badminton of the career right now.

A veteran of the junior circuit, Varish has competed across U11, U13 and U15, accumulating invaluable experience at every age group. That depth of competitive history is an asset that younger opponents simply cannot replicate.

Varish has competed across 5 different regions of the country (Midwest, NE, NorCal, SoCal, South), demonstrating a willingness to travel and test the game against diverse styles of play from coast to coast.

Varish has been seeded #1 or #2 in 21 events — a recognition by tournament committees that this player is among the very best in the draw. That target on the back only makes the victories more impressive.

With 5 seasons of competitive experience and 23 titles to show for it, Varish is a battle-hardened competitor whose journey is a testament to what dedication, talent, and love for the game can produce.

With 5 seasons of competitive experience and 15 titles to show for it, Vignan is a battle-hardened competitor whose journey is a testament to what dedication, talent, and love for the game can produce.
